prediction.reasoning: NEE (NextEra Energy) is a large utility stock with relatively low volatility. Based on historical volatility patterns for utility stocks (~15-20% annualized), I estimate a 20-day standard deviation of approximately 3.8%. The slight upward bias in the point estimate reflects the general long-term growth trend of utilities and dividend reinvestment effects. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming approximate normal distribution of returns over the 20-day period.
